falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above $150,000 (key resistance level identified in the bottom_2022_may_luna pattern) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this level would indicate a bullish trend reversal, invalidating the HOLD signal and contradicting the pattern's historical behavior.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volatility (measured by the CBOE VIX index) surges to 35+ (a 50% increase from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a spike in volatility would suggest a blowoff top scenario, contradicting the pattern's implication of a bottom and invalidating the current UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average on a single day, with price declining by 10% from the current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination of extreme volume and bearish price action would indicate a confirmed downtrend, refuting the pattern's similarity to a historical bottom and invalidating the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
